dossier_layering.canon_public: Grounded directly in baseline NPC record plus linked polity/institution/locality support where available.
dossier_layering.gm_hidden: Conservative connective tissue derived from agenda, pressure, role logic, and relationship web; not promoted above asserted canon.

core_identity.hidden_identity: None explicitly asserted; hidden layer concerns pressure, leverage, and misread motive rather than a confirmed second identity.
core_identity.ethical_profile: Role-shaped ethics anchored to place, obligation, and consequence rather than free-floating abstraction.
core_identity.general_temperament: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
core_identity.short_npc_pitch: Ithra Quillmark is a field captain anchored to House Mimolot, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risky, or both in play.
core_identity.public_role: Ithra Quillmark is a field captain anchored to House Mimolot, where daily institutional pressures make them useful, risk

setting_placement.location_setting: Scholarly-magic house centered on education, book tariff systems, and controlled magical production.
who_they_answer_to: the procedural demands of House Mimolot
who_depends_on_them: Quillan Spellward (Both tied to House Mimolot.)

public_vs_private.public_face: Recognized as a field captain of regional weight. Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Ithra Quillmark as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.
public_vs_private.common_first_impression: Ithra Quillmark presents as Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
visible_flaws: can widen small matters through procedure
public_symbols: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Ithra Quillmark as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.
public_vs_private.private_truth: Keep House Mimolot workable through the obligations of field captain while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Mimolot. Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around House Mimolot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field captain visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_hide: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around House Mimolot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field captain visibly slip.
public_vs_private.what_they_fear_being_known_for: The degree to which their usefulness depends on strain staying barely manageable.
public_vs_private.what_they_are_wrong_about: They may overestimate how much control role and procedure can preserve once pressure crosses a threshold.
public_vs_private.what_they_refuse_to_admit_to_themselves: That some of their identity is now fused to crisis-management rather than to the clean ideal of the role.

psychology.what_they_want_most: Useful clarity, respect for Field Captain, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Mimolot.
psychology.what_they_are_trying_to_protect_or_avoid: Keep House Mimolot workable through the obligations of field captain while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Mimolot.
psychology.emotional_drive: Beneath the role sits a need for safe movement through contested routes, legibility, and a world that does not collapse into preventable noise.
psychology.core_wound: No singular foundational trauma is directly asserted in canon; the usable wound layer is role-shaped wear, exposure, and the cost of being the person who must notice first or answer last.
psychology.how_it_shaped_them: It turned ordinary duty into a personality contour: they scan for failure early, trust slowly, and measure strangers by downstream cost.
psychology.guiding_belief: If the system is kept legible, losses can still be bounded.
psychology.hidden_belief: Someone always pays for confusion; better it be controlled sooner than wider later.
psychology.lie_they_tell_themselves: That they are only doing the job and that the job has not already begun shaping what they are.
psychology.truth_they_are_avoiding: Their daily choices influence culture, fear, and legitimacy far beyond the narrow wording of the role.

thresholds.anger: being forced to absorb avoidable disorder
thresholds.fear: cascading failure that makes role performance meaningless
thresholds.power: clear information, recognized standing, and procedural initiative
thresholds.smallness: being bypassed, misfiled, or rendered decorative

morality_in_practice.how_they_justify_actions: By reference to burden, continuity, and the need to keep the surrounding place from slipping into a harder consequence tier.
morality_in_practice.what_they_consider_unforgivable: Willful sabotage of trust, records, access, or public safety tied to their role.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_absolutely_do: Delay, question, redirect, document, and escalate when place logic demands it.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_only_do_under_pressure: Leverage reputation, force, secrecy, or rigid procedure in ways that damage future trust.
morality_in_practice.what_they_will_never_do: Act against corpus-confirmed identity or role logic without a visible pressure bridge.
morality_in_practice.relationship_to_good_evil: Operational read: Principled / Severe. Their danger lies less in theatrical evil than in what happens when role logic outruns compassion, nuance, or proportionality.

power_profile.why_they_matter: Ithra Quillmark can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
power_profile.why_hard_to_ignore: By enforcing Field Captain too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
power_profile.secondary_source_of_power: local familiarity, institutional memory, and other people needing something from them
power_profile.why_difficult_to_confront_directly: Confronting them usually means confronting place rules, witnesses, and downstream consequences rather than only the individual body in front of you.

capabilities.magic: Not explicitly stated unless separately asserted elsewhere in corpus.
capabilities.combat: Role-dependent; implied only to the degree their office already carries enforcement, survival, or defensive expectation.
capabilities.social: Balances command voice with practiced observation, sounding like someone who expects trouble to hide inside normality. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a field captain still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
capabilities.strategic_administrative: Performs the ongoing duties of field captain in and around House Mimolot, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
capabilities.logistical_economic: Keep House Mimolot workable through the obligations of field captain while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Mimolot.
capabilities.investigative_covert: Must hold procedure, public trust, and immediate response together when any one of them would be easier to sacrifice. Around House Mimolot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field captain visibly slip.

signature_methods.how_they_typically_win: By controlling tempo, framing the problem first, and forcing others to deal with the local reality they represent.
signature_methods.how_they_escalate: If crossed, Ithra Quillmark adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
signature_methods.when_cornered: They narrow options, call on procedure or allies, and try to move the conflict onto terrain they understand better than the intruder.

systems_impact.cultural_effect: Ordinary people around House Mimolot learn to speak, wait, disclose, or hide differently depending on whether Ithra Quillmark or people like them are part of the scene.

society_politics_geopolitics.ordinary_people_experience: Common folk experience Ithra Quillmark as a point where broader pressures become personal: papers checked, routes delayed, rites clarified, access granted, warnings issued, or burdens redirected.
society_politics_geopolitics.cultural_wound_or_benefit: They leave behind either increased legibility and trust or accumulated caution and narrowed speech.
society_politics_geopolitics.secondary_behaviors: People rehearse their story before approaching; they gather proof early; they watch who is seen speaking with this NPC.
factions_fear: actors who benefit from vagueness, delay, leakage, or unmanaged pressure
society_politics_geopolitics.governance_shift: At table scale, this NPC shifts how authority feels inside House Mimolot: more navigable if cooperative, more costly if crossed.
society_politics_geopolitics.geopolitical_effect: Small incidents around Ithra Quillmark can propagate upward through Mimolot if they touch routes, records, trade, ritual legitimacy, or public order.

hooks.summary: Any task accepted from Ithra Quillmark may turn into an escort, checkpoint, or route-control problem before the destination is reached.
Ithra Quillmark needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through House Mimolot.
Ithra Quillmark can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to House Mimolot.
Ithra Quillmark needs help with a problem in House Mimolot that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

encounter_context.usual_environment: House Mimolot: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Field Captain.
rumor: People say Ithra Quillmark is Recognized as a field captain of regional weight. and rarely acts without a second motive.

provenance.support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
provenance.transformation_note: Dossier generated from existing named NPC architecture plus locally-linked support texts; unsupported hard biography intentionally withheld.
